No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to health or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it inherently provides tertiary education and skills for employment, aligning with Targets 4.3 and 4.4.

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course explicitly covers 'HR & Employee Relations,' which directly relates to protecting labor rights and promoting safe working environments (Target 8.8).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course covers 'strategic planning,' 'business and financial regulations,' and 'Finance & Investor Relations,' supporting enterprise management and growth (Target 9.3).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: 'Community Relations' and 'decision-making in diverse organizations' imply a focus on social inclusion, aligning with Target 10.2. The 'social care' competence also supports this.
evidence: 具備關懷社會的反思再造能力 (Reflective and reconstructive ability for social care)

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: 'Community Relations' supports participatory planning (Target 11.3), and 'Crisis management' enhances resilience to disasters (Target 11.b).

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: 'Professional ethics' and 'business and financial regulations' can encourage companies to adopt sustainable practices (Target 12.6). 'Social care' competence also aligns.
evidence: 具備關懷社會的反思再造能力 (Reflective and reconstructive ability for social care)

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to marine life or oceans.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: 'Professional ethics,' 'Legal & Ethical Considerations,' and 'Government Relations' directly support building effective, accountable institutions (Target 16.6) and public information (16.10).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Public relations inherently involves building multi-stakeholder partnerships. 'Media relations,' 'Community Relations,' and 'Government Relations' directly align with Target 17.17.
